name: is.zori.entities.charactercontroller2d
description: DOTS 2D kinematic character controller: a faithful 2D port of Unity's com.unity.charactercontroller (collide-and-slide, grounding, step/slope handling, character/dynamic-body interactions, processor extensibility) built entirely on the is.zori.entities.physics2d substrate. Drives a kinematic body via swept MovePosition commands; renderer-agnostic.

samples.description: A single side-scrolling platformer character built on the controller: authored ground, slopes, steps, and a few dynamic boxes to push, with a worked IKinematicCharacterProcessor2D and the control/physics system pair. Renderer-agnostic.
